hero.title: Book a session today with an available practitioner
hero.note: This path shows only practitioners who are available now, with live pricing from the backend.

entry.title: Open instant booking
entry.note: This path only shows practitioners who are available now, with duration and pricing confirmed by the backend.

chips.pricingNote: Prices come directly from the backend

list.title: Practitioners available for instant booking
list.note: We show only practitioners who are ready right now, with durations and live prices from the system.

notes.PENDING: We are waiting for the practitioner to respond. The status refreshes automatically.
notes.ACCEPTED: The request was accepted, and you can continue to payment to complete the session.
notes.REJECTED: The request was rejected. You can start again and choose another practitioner.
notes.EXPIRED: The response window expired. You can create a new request now.
notes.CANCELLED: The request was cancelled. You can try again whenever you want.

request.pendingNote: The request stays fresh until the practitioner responds or the window expires.
request.acceptedNote: The request is accepted. Pay now to confirm the session and continue.
request.rejectedNote: You can try another practitioner or create a new request.
request.expiredNote: You can create a new request with a different duration or practitioner.
request.cancelledNote: You can try again any time.
request.payAction: Pay now to confirm the session

followUp.archiveNote: You can keep this summary or start a new request.

errors.genericHeading: We could not complete the action
errors.loadingHeading: We could not load instant booking
errors.loadingNote: Please try again in a moment.
errors.createFailed: We could not create the instant booking request. Please try again.
errors.cancelFailed: We could not cancel the request. Please try again.

empty.heading: No practitioners are available right now
empty.note: When a practitioner becomes available for instant booking, they will appear here with the live price and supported duration.
